user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: A project focused on improving piano playing skills through daily practice.

result.reasoning: The user wants to create a new learning project. Based on the context, 'Learning' is an existing category containing other projects like 'Language Proficiency: French' and 'DIY Indoor Herb Garden'. I am appending the new 'Piano Practice' project to the end of the 'Learning' section.
